message.content:
@startuml
title SD_getListFromExternalModule(fileName)
participant "store: SnsUserStore" as store
participant "«interface»\n:LoadSnsUsersFromExternalSource" as interface
participant ":List<SnsUserDTO>" as list

store -> store: 1 getListFromExternalModule(fileName)
activate store
store -> store: 2 className = getClassName(fileName)
store -> interface: 3 dtoList = readFileFromExternalSource(fileName)
activate interface
interface -> list: 4 create()
note right of interface: multiple interactions in the externalSource to extract a list of SnsUserDTO
deactivate interface
store <- store: 5 return dtoList
deactivate store
@enduml
